# Abstract {.unnumbered}

<!-- The abstract is set in the YAML front matter of manuscript.qmd.
     Use this file to draft or iterate on the abstract text before
     pasting the final version into the `abstract:` field.

     Nature Letter: ≤150 words, no citations, no subheadings.
     Frontiers in Biogeography: structured or unstructured, ≤350 words.

     Draft structure (Nature Letter):
     - 1–2 sentences: broad context / motivation
     - 1 sentence: gap or question addressed
     - 1 sentence: approach / data used
     - 2–3 sentences: key findings
     - 1 sentence: broader implication
-->

TODO: Draft abstract text here, then copy into `manuscript.qmd` YAML.
